name: Ivankov Emporio
alt_names: エンポリオ・イワンコフ
description:
__Devil Fruit:__ Horu Horu no Mi (Horm-Horm Fruit)
__Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia

Emporio Ivankov, Iva for short, is the former "Queen" of the Kamabakka Kingdom, who is known as a "Miracle Person", and a commander of the Revolutionaries army. He is currently a prisoner of Impel Down kept in Level 5, but lives in a secret "Okama Paradise" within the same level.
